scripts.aws_docker_login: aws ecr-public get-login-password --region us-east-1 | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin public.ecr.aws
scripts.deploy:local: DEPLOYMENT=localstack ORIGIN=http://localhost:3000 AWS_REGION=us-east-1 cdklocal deploy --outputs-file outputs.json ordinals && node ./scripts/generateTableNamesEnv.mjs
